deploy.startCommand:
chmod -R a+rwx /opt/data 2>/dev/null; printf '%s' "$HERMES_CONFIG_YAML" | base64 -d > /opt/data/config.yaml; printf 'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=%s
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS=%s
TELEGRAM_HOME_CHANNEL=%s
OPENROUTER_API_KEY=%s
GATEWAY_ALLOW_ALL_USERS=false
' "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" "$TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS" "$TELEGRAM_HOME_CHANNEL" "$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" > /opt/data/.env; hermes gateway run
